title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at ICICI Direct Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Direct Holdings Services! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Direct Holdings Services:
ICICI Direct Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
